# Smithery — three.ws MCP submission package

**Publisher:** three.ws · https://three.ws · `io.github.nirholas` namespace
**Repository:** https://github.com/nirholas/three.ws
**Contact:** support@three.ws
**Icon:** https://three.ws/three-ws-mcp-icon.svg
**Official MCP registry:** https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/?q=io.github.nirholas
**Coverage:** 42 servers — 7 hosted remote (Streamable HTTP) + 35 install-and-run (npm/stdio).

> Every field below is derived from `mcp-listing-source.json`. If a value looks stale, fix the manifest or the overlay and re-run the generators — never hand-edit this file.

## How to submit (fetched 2026-07 from smithery.ai/docs/build/publish)

Smithery is publisher-driven — publish by **URL** (hosted remote) or **MCPB bundle** (stdio), then Smithery auto-scans the server and introspects its tools.

- **Web:** https://smithery.ai/new — paste the server's public HTTPS URL.
- **CLI (remote):** `smithery mcp publish "<url>" -n <namespace/name>`
- **CLI (stdio bundle):** `smithery mcp publish ./server.mcpb -n <namespace/name>`
- After publishing, complete **Settings → Verification** on each server page for official-vendor status.
- If auto-scan fails, serve a static card at `/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json` (`serverInfo.name`/`version` required).

**[HUMAN: needs a Smithery account (GitHub OAuth) to publish under the `three-ws` namespace.]**
**[HUMAN: the two flagship remotes require OAuth/x402; Smithery's Gateway handles client registration automatically for URL-based servers — no client registration needed on our side.]**

## Lead with these (URL-publish, no install)

| Server | Name (registry) | Connect | What it does |
|---|---|---|---|
| **three.ws Avatars & Agents** | `io.github.nirholas/three.ws` | `https://three.ws/api/mcp` | Render 3D avatars, validate glTF/GLB, and read on-chain agent data — the flagship three.ws server. |
| **three.ws 3D Studio** | `io.github.nirholas/threews-3d-studio` | `https://three.ws/api/mcp-3d` | Turn text or an image into an animation-ready GLB: generate, auto-rig, retexture, optimize. |
| **three.ws 3D Studio (free)** | `io.github.nirholas/threews-3d-studio-free` | `https://three.ws/api/mcp-studio` | Free text/image → 3D. Five tools, no auth, no payment — forge meshes and rigged avatars on the house. |
| **three.ws Agent Wallet** | `io.github.nirholas/threews-agent` | `https://three.ws/api/mcp-agent` | Give your agent an x402 wallet: discover, pay for, and earn from services in USDC, bounded by spend caps. |
| **three.ws x402 Bazaar** | `io.github.nirholas/threews-x402-bazaar` | `https://three.ws/api/mcp-bazaar` | Discover and price paid agent services across the live x402 facilitator network. |
| **x402 Wallet** | `io.github.nirholas/x402-mcp` | `npx -y @three-ws/x402-mcp` | Self-custodial x402 wallet for AI agents: find, inspect, and pay any service in USDC or $THREE from your own key. |
| **$THREE Token** | `io.github.nirholas/three-token-mcp` | `npx -y @three-ws/three-token-mcp` | Price, hold, and burn $THREE on Solana — the first MCP server whose actions burn a token. |
| **pump.fun Solana Data** | `io.github.nirholas/pumpfun-solana-mcp` | `npx -y @three-ws/pumpfun-mcp` | Free, read-only pump.fun + Solana MCP: token discovery, on-chain analysis, SNS, 3D snapshots. |
| **IBM Granite x402 Remote** | `io.github.nirholas/ibm-x402-mcp-remote` | `https://three.ws/api/ibm-mcp` | Pay-per-use IBM Granite AI via x402: chat, code, embeddings, forecasting. USDC on Base or Solana. |


## Per-server listing copy

### three.ws Avatars & Agents
- **Registry name:** `io.github.nirholas/three.ws`
- **Type:** Remote (Streamable HTTP) — publish by URL
- **Connect:** `https://three.ws/api/mcp`
- **Tagline:** Render 3D avatars, validate glTF/GLB, and read on-chain agent data — the flagship three.ws server.
- **Category:** 3d · **Tags:** 3d, avatars, gltf, solana, agents
- **Description:** 3D avatars, embeds, glTF tools, agent memory, and on-chain agent identity from three.ws.
- **Example prompts:**
  - "Render the avatar for agent alice as an embeddable 3D viewer."
  - "Validate and optimize this GLB and report its triangle count."
  - "Search public three.ws avatars for a cyberpunk knight."


### three.ws 3D Studio
- **Registry name:** `io.github.nirholas/threews-3d-studio`
- **Type:** Remote (Streamable HTTP) — publish by URL
- **Connect:** `https://three.ws/api/mcp-3d`
- **Tagline:** Turn text or an image into an animation-ready GLB: generate, auto-rig, retexture, optimize.
- **Category:** 3d · **Tags:** text-to-3d, image-to-3d, rigging, glb, x402
- **Description:** Turn text or an image into an animation-ready 3D model (GLB): generate, rig, animate, retexture.
- **Example prompts:**
  - "Generate a 3D model of a brass steampunk owl and rig it for animation."
  - "Turn these three reference photos into a textured GLB."
  - "Auto-rig this GLB so I can animate it."


### three.ws 3D Studio (free)
- **Registry name:** `io.github.nirholas/threews-3d-studio-free`
- **Type:** Remote (Streamable HTTP) — publish by URL
- **Connect:** `https://three.ws/api/mcp-studio`
- **Tagline:** Free text/image → 3D. Five tools, no auth, no payment — forge meshes and rigged avatars on the house.
- **Category:** 3d · **Tags:** text-to-3d, free, avatars, rigging, nvidia-nim
- **Description:** Free text/image → 3D. Five tools, no auth, no payment: forge_free (text → textured GLB), text_to_avatar (text/image → avatar), mesh_forge (art-directed mesh), rig_mesh (auto-rig a GLB for animation), forge_avatar (one-call text → rigged avatar). Results render in an interactive viewer.
- **Example prompts:**
  - "Free: forge a 3D model of a mushroom house from text."
  - "Free: make a rigged 3D avatar of an astronaut in one step."
  - "Free: auto-rig this GLB for animation."


### three.ws Agent Wallet
- **Registry name:** `io.github.nirholas/threews-agent`
- **Type:** Remote (Streamable HTTP) — publish by URL
- **Connect:** `https://three.ws/api/mcp-agent`
- **Tagline:** Give your agent an x402 wallet: discover, pay for, and earn from services in USDC, bounded by spend caps.
- **Category:** payments · **Tags:** x402, wallet, usdc, agent-payments, spend-caps
- **Description:** Give your AI agent an x402 wallet: discover and pay for services in USDC, or earn from your own.
- **Example prompts:**
  - "What is my agent wallet balance?"
  - "Find an x402 image-generation service and pay for one call, capped at $0.10."
  - "Monetize my endpoint so other agents can pay to use it."


### three.ws x402 Bazaar
- **Registry name:** `io.github.nirholas/threews-x402-bazaar`
- **Type:** Remote (Streamable HTTP) — publish by URL
- **Connect:** `https://three.ws/api/mcp-bazaar`
- **Tagline:** Discover and price paid agent services across the live x402 facilitator network.
- **Category:** agent-economy · **Tags:** x402, discovery, marketplace, agents, usdc
- **Description:** Discover and price paid agent services across the live x402 network, by three.ws.
- **Example prompts:**
  - "Search the x402 bazaar for crypto price APIs and show their per-call price."
  - "Inspect the payment requirements of this x402 endpoint."
  - "List the cheapest 3D-generation services on the bazaar."


### x402 Wallet
- **Registry name:** `io.github.nirholas/x402-mcp`
- **Type:** Local (stdio) — publish as MCPB bundle or npm
- **Connect:** `npx -y @three-ws/x402-mcp`
- **Tagline:** Self-custodial x402 wallet for AI agents: find, inspect, and pay any service in USDC or $THREE from your own key.
- **Category:** payments · **Tags:** x402, wallet, usdc, self-custodial, payments
- **Description:** Self-custodial x402 wallet for AI agents: pay any service in USDC or $THREE from your own key.
- **Example prompts:**
  - "Find x402 services that generate images."
  - "Inspect the price of this x402 endpoint before paying."
  - "Pay and call this x402 endpoint with a $0.05 cap."
